parts.raw:
There is a new world coming, $(l.name)!  And it’s beautiful! 

Ordered. Safe. Unambiguous. A world where everyone knows their place.

Imagine it!  A world without chaos. Without selfishness, or any other human failings. No one to betray you or hurt you or--

How entertaining!

I’m glad you weren’t killed at the cemetery, $(l.name). It will be much more fun to watch you die.
Open your mind, $(l.name). They are so much more than you think.
Are we talking about the same man? My brother was worthless, $(l.name). Worthless. He used people. He...
Goodbye, $(l.name). I hope you find what you're looking for. Stay safe.
All right, what would you like to talk about, $(l.name)?

Listen, $(l.name). I don’t want to talk about what happened with Gino, okay? What’s done is done. Gino’s dead, I’m alive, and that’s all there is to it. 

It’s the Barrens, right? Nothing more to do or say.
See you around, $(l.name). You’re quite a $(l.guy). I can honestly say, I’ve never met anyone quite like you.
See you around, $(l.name). You’re quite a $(l.guy). I can honestly say, I’ve never met an $(l.race) quite like you.
See you around, $(l.name). You’re quite a $(l.guy). I can honestly say, I’ve never met a $(l.race) quite like you.
$(l.name), don't attack any of the chip-heads! They don't know what they're doing, and you could hurt Gino.
It is clear that you must go to the funeral and talk with Jessica Watts, $(l.name).

Domo arigato, $(l.Name). That girl is precious to me. 

It is not often that we see acts like these in the Barrens. You have performed a great service for my little family and I welcome you into my home. Consider it yours while your work keeps you here. 

But we both know that words are mere air. Beyond my thanks, I offer you this renumeration. Please take it as a show of respect.
You will find more than a bunk, $(l.name). There is more to the Union then meets the eye.
Sorry, didn't expect any visitors at this hour. And some asshole at corporate took my receptionist. What can I do for you, $(l.Sir)?
Hey, $(l.name). I gotta talk fast. Looks like the Ripper got another one. The victim worked at the NTSB investigation facility down on the docks.
Don’t mention it! Take care, $(l.name)!
Great. I’m sure there are other people you’ll want to talk to first. Take care, $(l.name)!
I guess so! Take care, $(l.name)!
Yeah, $(l.he)’s on the level. Working for Sam, believe it or not... some sort of dead man’s switch. I thought you could help $(l.him) out. *Maybe* even stop moping around the shop all day...
Whatever it is you’ve gotten into, $(l.name)... you’re in it deep. From what I hear, the Brotherhood has members in high places - government, corps, law enforcement... you be careful, chummer.
$(l.name), when David gives me the sequence, I'll jack in and help you trace the blood sample back to its source.
I just got a second wind! Meet you at my rig, $(l.name).
We found an exact match for the DNA, but it was linked to a dead chop shop assistant by the name of Silas Forsberg. Now, I have my theories, but what do you think is going on here, $(l.name)?

Hey, don’t scare the kid, Hansel. We still need $(l.him) to go on the mission! 

By the by, I’m coming with you, $(l.name). I wouldn’t mind seeing these creatures for myself. I missed ‘em last time. Telestrian will bankroll you so you can hire the rest of the team.

… and after we broke up the ritual, $(l.name) chased Jessica into a small chamber where she was cornered by a couple of buggers. Guess they weren’t impressed with her performance. They were about to eat her.

And $(l.he) let them. It was gruesome but I guess she had it coming. Still, I could do without all that crunching.

So, the nest has been cleaned out, the shaman is dead, and your cousin Lynne is being transported to a mental hospital for observation.

This is simple accounting,  $(l.name). Business. I’m sure you can understand. Still, you were of service to the world, as you say. There can be no debate on that topic. A yeoman’s effort, to be sure and - regardless of your obvious flaws - you are deserving of a reward.

Quite. This is simple accounting,  $(l.name). Business. I’m sure you can understand. Still, you were of service. There can be no debate on that topic. A yeoman’s effort, to be sure and - regardless of your obvious flaws - you are deserving of a reward.

And $(l.he) killed her before they could do it. Some sort of street justice, I suppose. I don’t know - I haven’t been following the story closely.

So, the nest has been cleaned out, the shaman is dead, and your cousin Lynne is being transported to a mental hospital for observation.

And $(l.name) says something like “I won’t let them eat you, Jessica. You’re coming with me. You’re going to pay for what you’ve done.” It was very dramatic.

Then, we splattered the bugs and handed her over to the UCAS FBI. They’re going to want to have a long talk with her about the Universal Brotherhood. So, this nest is cleaned out and your cousin Lynne is being transported to a mental hospital for observation.
That’s the spirit! I like a $(l.man) who rolls with the punches.
That’s the spirit! I like a $(l.man) who rolls with the punches.
Whatever you say, $(l.name). I’m swamped, so I’ve gotta get back.

Whatever you say, $(l.name). 

Oh, before you go. Johnny Clean asked me to flag you down the minute I saw you. Said he’s got someone who wants to talk to you. He sounded a little freaked out about it. He’s waiting for you downstairs.

Hey there, $(l.name)! Johnny Clean asked me to flag you down the minute I saw you. Said he’s got someone who wants to talk to you. He sounded a little freaked out about it. He’s waiting for you downstairs.

You have generated a considerable amount of damage to my office complex, killed or wounded many of my security personnel, and cost my Vice President of Security his job. 

In 24 hours you have accumulated quite a bill with me, $(l.sir).

You impress me, $(l.sir). My father’s bastards are intentionally not well known, even to themselves. Nevertheless, I fail to see the connection between this "Sam Watt’s" death and a raid on one of my office buildings. There is no connection between the research project and the dead man that I am aware of.

Lady and gentlemen this is... $(l.name). $+(l.he) is the $(l.race) who saved my daughter and the only one who has faced our common enemy in combat. 

Herr Brackhaus, what does the representative of the Great Dragon, Lofwyr, have to tell us about the magical insect this... shadowrunner uncovered?

This is not an infestation, $(l.name). 

It is an invasion.
Enough. Are you willing to undergo this mission, $(l.name)?

Do not overplay your hand, $(l.sir). You could still be arrested for the attack on my office and, if my sources are correct, the justifiable but illegal death of Dr. Holmes. Alternately, I could simply eliminate you and find one of the mercenaries you hired to play your part.
See that our hero gets $(l.his) reward. After deductions, of course.
See that our hero gets $(l.his) reward. After deductions, of course.
Evening, $(l.sir).
I'll leave you to your business, $(l.sir).
Glad to see you well, $(l.name).
Welcome back, $(l.name).
And yet your shoulders are no more relaxed, and you still survey the room like a $(l.man) who has yet to return from war. This isn’t over, is it?
Take care, $(l.name).
You all right, $(l.name)?
Go get ‘em, $(l.sir).

The drek you were! 

You get anywhere near my investigation and it will be YOU on the slab, $(l.race).

I suggest you keep your smart-ass remarks to yourself this time, $(l.race). 

Mr. Telestrian isn’t some streetmeat you can impress or intimidate. He’s the brains behind the throne of Tir Tairngire and one of the richest men in Seattle.
Hold on, $(l.name). Think about this.
I heard Mitsuhama’s looking for a team and they specifically want $(l.race_plural). No idea what that’s about.

I got nothing left to give, $(l.guy). It all goes to BTLs.

Everything.

Please! Just a few nuyen.
Thanks for meeting us, $(l.name). I owe you one.
Welcome, $(l.name). Is there anything I might provide to make your life easier, or perhaps make another’s more difficult?
I do not “run” at all, $(l.name). I go where I am needed. I am needed here.
I am doing what I do, $(l.name). Providing those in need with the tools they require.
I have been impressed with you for some time, $(l.name). It is good that you are here.
Ah, $(l.name). I was watching your approach from the astral realm. So good of you to visit again.

Good evening, young $(l.Race) and welcome to this humble home that we call the Union. I am Aljernon Half-Dream.

To ease your way through the Sixth World, I offer you the best in magical foci, spells, and fetishes for the conjuring of spirits.
$(l.name), if we go up there, I'm not leaving until we find Coyote.
$(l.name), if we go up there, I'm not leaving until we find Coyote.
Hey, $(l.name), you're not leaving me down here!
Come on $(l.guy), let's go find Coyote.
Jeez, $(l.guy). Do you really think this is the time?
$(l.name)! Can’t you see she’s in pain?
Watch yourself, little $(l.man). What you want?
Beauty lies in the eyes of the beholder, $(l.sir).
Good luck to you, $(l.name). I hope you can find the same justice for your friend that I found for my brother.

After a fashion, yes, $(l.sir). Sergeant in the 31st California Militia. It's no longer a recognized unit, and there are those who would say we never were. But someone had to stand up to the Tir, and it fell to us.

Yes, $(l.sir). I was in CalFree when the elves came marching down from the north in '36. After the UCAS pulled their support, we had little in the ways of an organized defense. But what we did have was a stockpile of weapons and ammo down in Oakland.
No, $(l.name). I didn't miss a beat. I was on my game the whole time. Remember, I was on point. New Larry was supposed to cover Dowd.
We should choose our friends more carefully, $(l.name).

You were born for this gig, $(l.name). Me... not so much. 

I think I’m gonna hang it up - find a nice brothel somewhere. Stay drunk until I croak.

You were born for this gig, $(l.name). Me... not so much. 

I think I’m gonna hang it up - find a nice brothel somewhere. Stay drunk until I croak.

You were born for this gig, $(l.name). 

Me... not so much.

Better’n me? Sounds easy. Keep in touch, $(l.name). 

Don’t die a stranger.
Welcome $(scene.BroSis)! Are you ready to build a better tomorrow?
Then go right in, $(scene.BroSis)! Someone from the Counseling Center would love to talk with you.
Of course, $(scene.BroSis)! Go right ahead and ask.
Yes, $(scene.BroSis)! We don’t try to hide that!
That’s because it is, $(scene.BroSis)!
You say that like it’s a bad thing, $(scene.BroSis)!
Why anyone, of course! It wouldn’t be very universal if we left anyone out, would it, $(scene.BroSis)?
Why anyone, of course! It wouldn’t be very universal if we left anyone out, would it? $+(l.race_plural) are especially welcome, $(scene.BroSis)!
Absolutely, $(scene.BroSis)! In a world as cold as this one, what’s more important than Belonging? I can see you have some questions. Why don’t you ask them?
How can I help you, $(scene.BroSis)?
Oh, $(scene.BroSis) - I forgot to mention that everyone must enter the Universal Brotherhood alone.

Welcome $(scene.BroSis)! I hope you are ready to build a better tomorrow!

I’m sorry but we do not allow groups. Everyone must enter the Universal Brotherhood alone.
Hey, $(l.guy), have you seen Josie?
This $(l.guy) here has... exotic tastes. $+(l.he) wants to help us out and is willing to pay for the privilege. That, and a copy of the recording.
Haven't seen you before $(l.guy). Lookin' to go somewhere special?
Listen $(l.guy), I'm too busy for your chit-chat. Buy something or get out.
It’s you! You’re the $(l.man) who helped me escape from the Universal Brotherhood! How did you get here?
Yes, it is $(scene.BroSis). You can enter with your Home or Sanctuary access keycard.
Yes, it is $(scene.BroSis). I would not expect a new face to have such high clearance already. Your key card will allow you access.
I knew you were just lookin' to cause static. Dash, ice this $(l.guy)!
Hey $(l.race) welcome back, you're either up really early or really late.
Hey, I know you. You’re... uh... $(l.Name)! Thanks again for your help back in 2012. What can I do for you today?
Your client is the chalk line? That’s messed up $(l.man), but I respect it, ok, but don’t mess anything up. Not that anyone would likely notice because the forensics aren’t coming back.
You ever hear of the Nephilim Network? Of course you have. An in-the-know $(l.guy) like you has to have heard of *the* premier merc team out there.
Attention. $(l.name), please report to the north hall to meet with the administrator.
Welcome, $(l.sir)! What business brings you to Mercy Mental Hospital?
Yes $(scene.BroSis)? What can I do for you?
I didn't think you $(l.guy)s were allowed to have friends outside of the Universal Brotherhood?
Then yes. YES! I’m $(s.name).
Sure, $(l.name), sure. Whatever you say.
This is correct. You are a smart $(l.guy). What can I do for you, Smart $+(l.guy)?

I know the perfect $(scene.BroSis) to speak with you, $(l.he) has a similar background and talks $(scene.TalkAbout). 

You two would get along fabulously, but $(l.he) isn't in today and the rest of my counselor are currently booked.

Could you come back tomorrow?
Hello $(scene.BroSis), what can I help you with?
Yes, $(l.sir). I work for Maria Mercurial. Something I can do for you?
It's just down the street, $(l.sir). Please... our livelihoods depend on this market.
$(l.sir), please... our livelihoods depend on this market. If you reconsider... it's just down the street.
Oh... thank you! It's just down the street, $(l.sir). Please... our livelihoods depend on this market.
I think young Zipper here is just about spent. Now... just give me a moment to hook up a recording rig to our friend here and $(l.he)'ll have quite the BTL for $(l.his) personal collection.
Whoa, okay $(l.guy)! I'm gone!
Whoa, okay $(l.guy)! I'm gone!

Hey $(l.guy), I'm discreet. I don’t talk about what my clients or what they buy. Bad for biz. 

However, I'm sure she would recommend me - IF she was a customer. Which I'm not saying she is.

Alright, $(l.man). Go down the hall and take a left and you will see the cell, you'll know it when you see it. We have been waiting for that chip, time to make an example out of that slitch. 

Oh and you already brought some zebra meat glad you thought ahead. Shoulda seen what happened to the last guy. The hounds will tear you to pieces without it.

Alright, $(l.man). Go down the hall and take a left and you will see the cell, you'll know it when you see it. We have been waiting for that chip, time to make an example out of that slitch. 

Oh and take this zebra meat with you. The hounds will tear you to pieces without it.
Stop right there my friend, I don't know what your story is but I assure you, I will find out. Hold $(l.him).
Hey $(l.guy). I got some extra outfits I'm trying to unload, you want first dibs?
Hey $(l.guy), I got some armored clothing here if you're interested.
Look $(l.guy), I didn't want to have to do this.
Hey, $(l.guy), you have any extra nuyen? Just need some SucroZoom from the shack over there...
Heyyyy, chummer. Got some tasty morsels for you. Just what every well-dressed shadowrunner should have in $(l.his) back pocket.

Yo, $(l.guy). Have we met? You look familiar. 

I meet a lot of people. No problem. You need some brainbenders tonight? I got some of that merc stuff. Freakers, taxi drivers, you know.

Looks like we woke up the neighbors. We've got ghouls incoming! 

Hey $(l.name), maybe we can use this to our advantage.

Keycard printing for $(scene.BroSis) $(l.name) ... 

Keycard complete. WARNING: This keycard provides access to a high-security area. Approved uniforms are required in all high-security areas.

Keycard printing for $(scene.FatherMother) $(l.name) ... 

Keycard complete. WARNING: This keycard provides access to a high-security area. Approved uniforms are required in all high-security areas.
